attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT  
	WCMP.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY  					SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
	WCMP.DV_END_CUSTOMER_KEY					DV_END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
	WCMP.SALES_ORDER_KEY						SALES_ORDER_KEY, 
	CASE WHEN END_CUSTOMER_TYPE_CODE='ACCOUNT' THEN COALESCE(NEP_END_CUST.PARTY_KEY,-999)
	     WHEN END_CUSTOMER_TYPE_CODE='ACCOUNT_LOCATION' THEN COALESCE(NECAL_END_CUST_LOC.CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY,-999)
	     ELSE -999
	END  								DV_END_CUST_PARTY_KEY ,
	/*CASE WHEN COALESCE(NCPS.DD_GRNDPARNT_PARTNER_PARTY_KEY,-999) = -999 THEN -999
		ELSE COALESCE(NP.PARTY_KEY,-999) 
	END 								DEALS_PPSK,  */
  CASE WHEN COALESCE(NCPS.DD_GRNDPARNT_PARTNER_PARTY_KEY,-999) = -999  THEN
  CASE WHEN NEP.ERP_PARTY_NAME LIKE ANY  ('%CS CAPITAL%','%CISCO SYSTEMS CAPITAL%', 'CISCO SYSTEMS FINANCE %','EXPEDIA INC')
  THEN COALESCE(SHIPS.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY,-999) 
  ELSE -999 END
   ELSE COALESCE(NP.PARTY_KEY,-999)
END         DEALS_PPSK,
USER   						    	 	EDW_CREATE_USER,
	CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) 					 	EDW_CREATE_DATETIME,
  WCMP.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY 
FROM  $$STGDB.WI_SALES_CHNL_MTX_PTRNS_DVAD WCMP

LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT NCA_END_CUST
	ON NCA_END_CUST.CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY= WCMP.DV_END_CUSTOMER_KEY

LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_PARTY NEP_END_CUST
	ON NEP_END_CUST.ERP_PARTY_NUMBER = NCA_END_CUST.ERP_CUSTOMER_NUMBER
				
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE NECAL_END_CUST_LOC
	ON NECAL_END_CUST_LOC.ERP_CUST_ACCOUNT_LOCATION_KEY = WCMP.DV_END_CUSTOMER_KEY

INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSO
	ON WCMP.SALES_ORDER_KEY = NSO. SALES_ORDER_KEY

LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_DM_DEAL_PARTNER_VW STDEALS	
	ON NSO.BK_DEAL_ID = STDEALS.OPTY_NUMBER 
		
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PARTY NP
	ON STDEALS.PARTNER_SITE_ID = NP.PARTY_SSOT_PARTY_ID_INT AND
	NP.SS_CODE = 'CR'

LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CHANNEL_PARTNER_SITE NCPS	
	ON NP.PARTY_KEY = NCPS.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY
	AND NCPS.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG='N'	

LEFT OUTER JOIN ( $$COMREFVWDB.N_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT NCA
   INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_PARTY NEP
   ON(NEP.ERP_PARTY_NUMBER = NCA.ERP_CUSTOMER_NUMBER) 
     )
  ON (NCA.CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY= WCMP.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY )
  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE STP
  ON STP.ERP_CUST_ACCOUNT_LOCATION_KEY = WCMP.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CHANNEL_PARTNER_SITE SHIPS
  ON STP.CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY=SHIPS.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY
  AND SHIPS.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG='N'

SELECT 	
	WCMC.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY	
	,WCMC.DV_END_CUSTOMER_KEY
	,WCMC.SALES_ORDER_KEY 			
	,WCMC.DV_END_CUST_PARTY_KEY	
	,WCMC.DEALS_PPSK			
	,WCMC.EDW_CREATE_USER		
	,WCMC.EDW_CREATE_DATETIME			
	,WCMC.DV_END_CUST_COUNTRY_CD
	,WCMC.DEALS_CNTRY_CD
	,COALESCE(DSHIP.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY,-999) AS DEALS_PARTY_SITE_KEY
	,WCMC.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
FROM $$STGDB.WI_SALES_CHNL_MTX_COUNTRY_DVAD WCMC

LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CHANNEL_PARTNER_SITE NCPS
ON WCMC.DEALS_PPSK = NCPS.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY

LEFT OUTER JOIN  (SELECT PS.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY, 
			COALESCE(PS.BK_PARTY_ID_INT,-999) PARTY_ID,
			COALESCE(DD_GRNDPARNT_PARTNER_PARTY_KEY,-999) DD_GRNDPARNT_PARTNER_PARTY_KEY,
			COALESCE (BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE,'UNK')  ISO_COUNTRY_CODE
		  FROM 
			$$COMREFVWDB.N_CHANNEL_PARTNER_SITE PS,
			$$COMREFVWDB.N_CHNL_PTNR_COUNTRY PC
		  WHERE 1=1
		  AND   PS.PARTNER_COUNTRY_PARTY_KEY = PC.PARTNER_COUNTRY_PARTY_KEY
  		  AND   PS.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG='N'
		  AND   PC.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG='N'
		  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY DD_GRNDPARNT_PARTNER_PARTY_KEY,ISO_COUNTRY_CODE 
			    ORDER BY PARTY_ID ASC) =1)  
			    DSHIP
	ON COALESCE(NCPS.DD_GRNDPARNT_PARTNER_PARTY_KEY,-999) = DSHIP.DD_GRNDPARNT_PARTNER_PARTY_KEY
	AND WCMC.DV_END_CUST_COUNTRY_CD = DSHIP.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE

SELECT	
	WCMDSI.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY	
	,WCMDSI.DV_END_CUSTOMER_KEY		
	,WCMDSI.SALES_ORDER_KEY 	
	,CASE	WHEN WCMDSI.DEALS_PPSK = -999 THEN -999 
	        ELSE 
	   	     	CASE WHEN WCMDSI.DEALS_PPSK = WCMDSI.DV_END_CUST_PARTY_KEY   THEN WCMDSI.DEALS_PPSK 
	   	   		ELSE
	   	   		   CASE WHEN WCMDSI.DEALS_CNTRY_CD = WCMDSI.DV_END_CUST_COUNTRY_CD THEN WCMDSI.DEALS_PPSK
	   	   		      ELSE
	   	   		      	CASE WHEN WCMDSI.DEALS_PARTY_SITE_KEY = -999 THEN WCMDSI.DEALS_PPSK
	   	   		      	     ELSE WCMDSI.DEALS_PARTY_SITE_KEY	 
	   	   		        END
	   	   		   END
	   	   
	   	  END
	END PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY
		
		
	,CASE  WHEN WCMDSI.DEALS_PPSK = -999 THEN 'N' 
		ELSE  
		CASE WHEN WCMDSI.DEALS_PPSK = WCMDSI.DV_END_CUST_PARTY_KEY THEN 'N'
			ELSE
			 CASE WHEN WCMDSI.DV_END_CUST_COUNTRY_CD = 'UNK' THEN 'N'
				ELSE 
				 CASE WHEN WCMDSI.DEALS_CNTRY_CD  =  WCMDSI.DV_END_CUST_COUNTRY_CD   THEN  'N'
					ELSE 'Y'
				 END
			 END
		END  
	END CHANNEL_DROP_SHIP_FLG 
	
	,'Y' AS DV_DRCT_VAL_ADDED_DSTI_ORD_FLG
	  
	,'Y' AS SALES_CHANNEL_BOOKING_FLG
	  
	,WCMDSI.EDW_CREATE_USER		
	,WCMDSI.EDW_CREATE_DATETIME
	,WCMDSI.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
FROM $$STGDB.WI_SLS_CHNL_MTX_DROP_SHIP_DVAD WCMDSI

SELECT 
	WCMP.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
	WCMP.DV_END_CUSTOMER_KEY, 
	WCMP.SALES_ORDER_KEY, 
	WCMP.DV_END_CUST_PARTY_KEY,
	WCMP.DEALS_PPSK,
	WCMP.EDW_CREATE_USER,
	WCMP.EDW_CREATE_DATETIME,
	COALESCE(END_CTRY.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE, 'UNK') DV_END_CUST_COUNTRY_CD,
	COALESCE(DEALS_CTRY.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE, 'UNK') DEALS_CNTRY_CD,
	WCMP.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
FROM $$STGDB.WI_SALES_CHNL_MTX_PRTNR_DVAD WCMP

LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT     NPAL.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE, NPLA.PARTY_KEY
 		  FROM 	     $$COMREFVWDB.N_PARTY_LOCATOR_ASGN NPLA
 		  INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_LOCATOR NLOC
		  	 ON NPLA.LOCATOR_KEY=NLOC.LOCATOR_KEY
		  	    AND NLOC.SS_CODE='CR'
		  	    AND NPLA.LOCATION_TYPE_CODE='POSTAL ADDRESS'
		  INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_POSTAL_ADDRESS_LOCATOR NPAL
		  	 ON NLOC.LOCATOR_KEY=NPAL.LOCATOR_KEY 
		) END_CTRY
		
ON 	     WCMP.DV_END_CUST_PARTY_KEY = END_CTRY.PARTY_KEY

LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT     NPAL.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE, NPLA.PARTY_KEY
 		  FROM 	     $$COMREFVWDB.N_PARTY_LOCATOR_ASGN NPLA
 		  INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_LOCATOR NLOC
		 	 ON NPLA.LOCATOR_KEY=NLOC.LOCATOR_KEY
		  	AND NLOC.SS_CODE='CR'
		  	AND NPLA.LOCATION_TYPE_CODE='POSTAL ADDRESS'
		  INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_POSTAL_ADDRESS_LOCATOR NPAL
		  	ON NLOC.LOCATOR_KEY=NPAL.LOCATOR_KEY 
		) DEALS_CTRY

ON 	    WCMP.DEALS_PPSK = DEALS_CTRY.PARTY_KEY
